iran_nuke.notes: Day 16 09:04 — ELEVATED STABLE. No new nuclear-specific signals. IDF launches extensive strikes across western Iran. Kharg Island 'obliterated' per Trump. 7,600 total strikes in Iran since Feb 28. No weapons-grade enrichment confirmed. 26 (stable).

iran_conventional.notes: Day 16 09:04 — IMMINENT RISING (capped). NEW since 08:04: (1) IDF launches 'extensive strikes' across western Iran (Guardian, just now). (2) Iran fires 6 ballistic missile salvos at Israel since midnight — sirens in Haifa (Hezbollah rockets simultaneously) and southern Israel, damage in Holon near Tel Aviv (Times of Israel). (3) Kuwait Air Force friendly fire incident — F/A-18 shot down 3 US F-15 fighters (!) per Wikipedia. (4) Trump says US 'obliterated' Kharg Island (NBC). 7,600 total strikes since Feb 28. Iran retaliation intensifying — simultaneous multi-axis: missiles to Israel, drones to Gulf, Hezbollah activation. 100 (capped, rising).

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 16 09:04 — IMMINENT RISING. NEW: (1) 15 Israeli helicopters land in eastern Lebanon near Nabi Sheet via Syrian border — new front opening (Wikipedia). (2) Israel plans 'largest ground invasion of Lebanon since 2006' targeting entire area south of Litani (DailyNewsEgypt/Axios). (3) 26+ medics killed in Israeli strikes since March 2 (Reuters). (4) Simultaneous Hezbollah rocket fire on Haifa + Iran missiles on Israel Sunday morning. (5) Direct talks still being arranged (Haaretz/Reuters). Campaign intensifying despite diplomatic track. 92 (rising).

turkey.notes: IMMINENT RISING. No Turkey-specific new signals this cycle. Previous: NATO intercepts 4th+ Iranian missile over Turkey. Turkey demands clarification. 72 + 6 (Iran coupling) = 78.

UPDATE: 6 killed in Russian missile/drone attacks overnight — 5 in Kyiv region, energy infrastructure + residential buildings hit (Guardian/Reuters). Russia attacks Ukrainian Railways again. 460 aerial targets intercepted. Trump slams Zelensky as 'far more difficult' than Putin. No peace talks. 77 + 5 (Iran coupling) = 82.

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch:
NO NEW DE-ESCALATION SIGNALS this cycle.

Continued escalation across all active fronts:
- IDF launches fresh extensive strikes across western Iran (ongoing right now)
- Iran retaliates with 6 missile salvos at Israel — multi-front coordination (Hezbollah rockets simultaneous)
- Shocking friendly fire: Kuwait downs 3 US F-15s — coalition coordination degrading
- Russia directly supplying Shahed drones to Iran — conflict widening
- Israel opens new helicopter landing zone in eastern Lebanon
- Ground invasion planning for full Litani south area

SEVEN IMMINENT. ONE CRITICAL. ONE ELEVATED.

latest_news.headline: IDF launches extensive strikes across western Iran
latest_news.text: IDF announces 'extensive strikes' across western Iran. New wave ongoing. 7,600 total strikes in Iran since Feb 28.

latest_news.headline: Iran fires 6 ballistic missile salvos at Israel since midnight
latest_news.text: Sirens sound in Haifa area (Hezbollah rockets from Lebanon simultaneously) and southern Israel. Damage reported in Holon near Tel Aviv from Iranian ballistic missile strike.

latest_news.headline: Kuwait Air Force friendly fire — F/A-18 shoots down 3 US F-15 fighters
latest_news.text: In a major friendly fire incident, a Kuwaiti F/A-18 pilot shot down three US Air Force F-15 fighters during operations over the Gulf. Coalition coordination severely degraded.

latest_news.headline: 15 Israeli helicopters land in eastern Lebanon near Nabi Sheet
latest_news.text: 15 Israeli helicopters landed forces in eastern Lebanon near Nabi Sheet, approaching from the Syrian side of the border. Hezbollah reports fighting Israeli forces in the area.

latest_news.headline: Russia sending Shahed drones to Iran for use against US/Israel
latest_news.text: Ukrainian President Zelensky claims Russia is sending Shahed drones to Iran to be used in the war against the US and Israel. If confirmed, this represents direct Russian material involvement.

latest_news.headline: Israel plans largest ground invasion of Lebanon since 2006
latest_news.text: Israel planning major expansion of ground operations targeting entire area south of Litani River to dismantle Hezbollah military infrastructure.

latest_news.headline: 6 killed in Russian missile/drone attacks on Ukraine
latest_news.text: Six killed as Russia unleashes missile and drone attacks. Five killed in Kyiv region — energy infrastructure, residential buildings, schools, businesses damaged.

latest_news.headline: 26+ medics killed in Israeli strikes on Lebanon since March 2
latest_news.text: At least 26 medics and first responders killed in Israeli strikes on Lebanon since March 2, per Lebanese Health Ministry.

outlook:
CRITICAL IMMINENT — Global war probability 85% IMMINENT (Day 16 09:04). MULTI-FRONT ESCALATION CONTINUING:

(1) IRAN → IMMINENT 100 (capped, RISING): IDF launches fresh extensive strikes across western Iran. Iran retaliates with 6 missile salvos at Israel — simultaneous with Hezbollah rockets on Haifa. Holon damaged. Coalition coordination shatters: Kuwait F/A-18 downs 3 US F-15s in friendly fire. Multi-axis Iranian retaliation ongoing.

(2) ISRAEL-LEBANON → IMMINENT 92 (RISING): 15 Israeli helicopters land in eastern Lebanon near Nabi Sheet via Syrian border — new front. Israel planning 'largest ground invasion since 2006.' 26+ medics killed. Simultaneous Hezbollah rocket fire on Haifa.

(3) PAKISTAN-AFGHANISTAN → IMMINENT 99 (capped): No change. Kandahar strike cycle continues.

(4) RUSSIA-UKRAINE → IMMINENT 82 (rising): 6 killed overnight. Russia attacks energy + civilian infrastructure. Zelensky claims Russia sending Shahed drones to Iran.

(5) RUSSIA → IMMINENT 77 (rising): Shahed drone transfers to Iran — direct material support to Iran war effort.

(6) TURKEY → IMMINENT 78 (rising). (7) DPRK → CRITICAL 47 (stable).

SEVEN IMMINENT, ONE CRITICAL, ONE ELEVATED. COALITION COHESION DEGRADING (Kuwait friendly fire, China/UK refuse Hormuz). Russia increasingly entangled via drone supply to Iran.
